mainEntity.name: What is the difference between Google SEO and Perplexity optimization for LA law firms?
mainEntity.text: What is the difference between Google SEO and Perplexity optimization for LA law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google SEO prioritizes backlinks and keywords for rankings, while Perplexity optimization focuses on direct, factual answers in natural language with strong E-E-A-T for AI extraction in LA legal queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: For Los Angeles law firms, Google SEO relies on technical site speed, mobile optimization, and high DA backlinks. Perplexity demands concise, snippet-ready paragraphs answering 'how to' and 'what if' questions precisely. LA's competitive market amplifies need for local schema and attorney-authored content to trigger AI overviews.

name: Google SEO vs Perplexity AEO for LA Law Firms
description: Google SEO prioritizes backlinks and keywords for rankings, while Perplexity optimization focuses on direct, factual answers in natural language with strong E-E
